! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
stderr 'call Endpoint cannot use both an sse stream and the execute callback'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /x sse(Endpoint(send, execute))" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.24
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Endpoint(send func(string) error, execute func(string) error) error {
	_, _ = send, execute
	return nil
}
